name: noah
description: A desktop companion — a digital being who lives in your PC.

scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/renderer/renderer/styles dist/renderer/renderer/lib && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/styles/main.css dist/renderer/renderer/styles/ && cp node_modules/three/build/three.module.js node_modules/three/build/three.core.js dist/renderer/renderer/lib/ && find dist/renderer -name '*.js' -not -name 'preload.js' -exec sed -i "s|from 'three'|from './lib/three.module.js'|g; s|from '../constants'|from '../constants/index.js'|g" {} + && python3 scripts/inline-renderer.py
scripts.dev: npm-run-all clean tsc:main tsc:renderer copy-assets --parallel tsc:watch start
